id-60418.title: Visual Artist Portfolio
id-60418.post-content:
The Visual Artist Portfolio template uses minimalist design to let your work speak for itself. It’s a well-balanced portfolio template that provides an attractive framework to show off your work, engage visitors and attract new clients.

The template includes an attractive frameless portfolio section, biography section, an area for testimonials and a contact form. There’s also a great-looking dedicated portfolio page where you can share all your best work for the world to see.

Key features of the Visual Artist Portfolio template

  • Minimalist design that’s clean and modern
  • Provides the framework to let your work shine through
  • Lots of whitespace so images really stand out
  • Includes all portfolio essentials
  • Fully compatible with leading page builders
id-60418.post-excerpt: The Visual Artist Portfolio template is a minimalist design with just enough to engage while allowing your work to shine through. It’s the perfect balance!

id-93101.title: Construction Equipment
id-93101.post-content:
The Construction Equipment template uses a corporate layout, alternating dark and light sections and bold contrast colors to draw the eye. Lots of content and image blocks help you tell your story along with testimonials, service pages and all you need to build a website.

All Starter Templates are fully customizable. You can change the colors, typography, layout, header, footer and everything you see on the page using built-in tools. Templates are also compatible with page builders, making it easy to make this template your own.

Key features of the Construction Equipment template

  • Corporate design ideal for the construction industry
  • Colorful and engaging layout
  • Includes everything you need for a business website
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-93101.post-excerpt: The Construction Equipment template is perfect for growing contractors and equipment rental businesses.

id-84975.title: Language Tutors
id-84975.post-content:
The Language Tutor template has a smart, crisp look, with a large hero section and muted colors with a bold contrast color. It looks professional and is designed to help you showcase your language skills or promote a language school.

The template features a natural color palette with pops of green and blue, which will be sure to make your website feel like a tranquil escape. The template has been carefully crafted to exhibit your services in the most elegant way possible.

Key features of the Language Tutor template

  • Inspired and inspiring website template
  • Muted color palette with bold contrast color
  • Includes all elements a typical language tutor needs
  • Fully responsive and SEO friendly
  • Compatible with leading page builders
id-84975.post-excerpt: Language Tutor template to help you share your knowledge with ease

id-93127.title: Homestay
id-93127.post-content:
The Homestay template has a relaxed vibe reminiscent of a Caribbean getaway or somewhere tropical. It’s chilled, inviting and delivers exactly the kind of feel that helps convert visitors into guests.

It’s a light fullscreen template that flows amazingly well and encourages you to follow the story down the page. Colors are great, typography is on point and there are lots of areas to promote your property. You can change anything you like using built-in tools so it’s easy to create something completely unique.

Key features of the Homestay template

  • Calm, relaxed feel ideal for vacation properties
  • Lots of areas to show off your property and encourage bookings
  • Fully customizable using built-in tools
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-93127.post-excerpt: The Homestay template is ideal for cozy guesthouses, vacation rentals, and family-run homestays.

id-60407.title: Digital Download Store
id-60407.post-content:
The Digital Download Store template is a crisp, clean design with engaging colors and images and all the ingredients an online store needs. It has a compelling hero section with call to action, trust signals above the fold and lots of space to showcase your products.

Product pages are simple and attractive, designed to let the product shine and convert customers. Cart pages, the checkout page, contact form and all supplementary pages reflect the clean design with minimum distractions.

Key features of the Digital Download Store template

  • Clean modern design for eCommerce stores
  • Supports digital downloads and physical products
  • Attractive product pages
  • Exceptional customer journey throughout the store
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-60407.post-excerpt: The Digital Download Store template is a high performance design for eCommerce stores.
